pattern: EGG HARDCOOKED|EGG HARD COOKED|EGG HARD CKD
assumption_note: Standard large hard-cooked/peeled egg -- ~1.75 oz each, matching the explicit-oz stated on other Sysco egg SKUs in this same export. "CKD" (UC Riverside's abbreviation for "cooked") added after finding "EGG HARD CKD CAGEFREE 12/12CT" didn't match the original spelled-out patterns.
Matches the explicit 1.5 oz stated on the sibling SKU "SPRINGROLL VEG 1.5 OZ" in this same export -- same item, just missing the explicit oz in the name.
Standard Hawaiian sweet dinner roll -- ~1.5 oz each.

6-inch flour tortilla (taco size) -- ~1 oz each. Matches both the spelled-out "6IN" (UCB) and the inch-quote symbol "6\"" (UCR) -- a real gap found when "TORTILLA FLOUR 6" ROMERO 8/36CT" didn't match the original IN-only pattern.

12-inch flour tortilla (wrap size, whether branded "WRAP" or a plain wheat/tomato-basil/etc. tortilla of the same size) -- ~3 oz each. Matches both "IN" and the inch-quote symbol -- real gap found when "TORTILLA WHEAT 12\"" LA BANDERITA 6/12CT" (no "WRAP" in the name at all) didn't match the original WRAP-anchored pattern.
13-inch large flour tortilla (burrito size) -- ~3.5 oz each. Matches both "IN" and the inch-quote symbol.
14-inch extra-large flour tortilla -- ~4.5 oz each. Matches both "IN" and the inch-quote symbol.
10-inch flour tortilla (standard burrito size) -- ~2 oz each. Matches both "IN" and the inch-quote symbol.
8-inch flour tortilla -- ~1.5 oz each. Matches both "IN" and the inch-quote symbol.
Corn tortilla -- smaller/lighter than flour, ~1 oz each.

Standard hot dog bun -- ~1.5 oz each (same proxy used elsewhere in this project for hot dog buns). "HOT DOG BUN" (reversed word order) added after finding "AVB HOT DOG BUNS 6"" didn't match the original "BUN HOT DOG" order.
Standard hamburger bun -- ~2.5 oz each (same proxy used elsewhere in this project for hamburger buns).
Mini brioche slider bun -- ~1 oz each.
Petite corn cob -- much smaller than a full ear, ~2.5 oz each (same proxy as the Daylight Foods "cobette" entry).
Standard appetizer potsticker -- ~0.7 oz each.
Mini cream puff pastry -- ~1 oz each.
Standard appetizer empanada -- ~3 oz each.
"10 CT" here means cans/jars of sliced olives per case, not individual olives -- a standard sliced-olive can runs ~14 oz.
Standard baklava piece -- ~1.5 oz each.
Standard pita bread -- ~2 oz each.
Mini macaron cookie -- ~0.5 oz each.
Standard English muffin -- ~2.17 oz each (same real stated-pack-weight-derived proxy used for Bimbo Bakery's English muffins in this project).
Bite-size brownie piece -- ~0.5 oz each.
Large lavash flatbread sheet (11x17 in) -- ~8 oz each, notably bigger than a standard pita.
